flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Salve Regina University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Salve Regina University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Salve Regina University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
